properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: There was nothing left Just a little bit of oil That was all she had the situation looks hopeless Life seems empty The fire that she had was gone And she could no longer sustain her family A widow with nothing, A widow with nothing That was her story.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: With the creditor approaching In her most desperate time of need She stood all alone No friends, no family. They read their charges, 'You cannot pay your debt, Your children now became our ransom, And they shall be taken." She cried, "Lord, I have nothing left!" I'm a widow with nothing." That was her testimony.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: But when God heard that desperate cry He came down for His own He quickly came to her As He heard the cry of His own He led her to find Elisha, The prophet for that hour

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: "Go, thus saith the Lord. God had already told me Your troubles will be gone The story of your life will be Different from now on. Bring every jar you can find, God will transform your life. The little oil that you have will be multiplied. Even now, right now."

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: "Your children will never be slaves And you will never be in debt anymore God has chosen you and in your home He will work a paradox."

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: In the house that was empty Now has everything The widow who was weeping Can rejoice and sing When there was nothing Today you can have it all Step out by faith and see God multiply your oil

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Now your fire's burning Shine your light each day You touched the hem of His garment As He passed your way All who saw you suffer At the hands of death Now sees the blessings of the Lord Even now, right now.
